channel.title: Yorkshire Events - Live Events in Yorkshire, UK
channel.description: Comprehensive RSS feed of live events happening across Yorkshire, UK. Aggregated from multiple sources.

image.title: Yorkshire Events - Live Events in Yorkshire, UK

item.title: Address
item.description: Bolling Hall Museum is marking 110 years with new photo displays from the 1870s–1880s and its 1912–1915 restoration, plus objects linked to its past, including a sword, a book from the garderobe and the 1915 opening key.
item.location: Bolling Hall, Bowling Hall Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD4 7LP
item.ify:location: Bolling Hall, Bowling Hall Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD4 7LP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: BD: Walls is an ambitious exhibition with a difference: the gallery is Bradford District itself.
item.location: New works on walls across Bradford District, Bradford, West Yorkshire
item.ify:location: New works on walls across Bradford District, Bradford, West Yorkshire
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Outdoor Yoga at Potteric Carr Nature Reserve
item.description: Join us at Potteric Carr throughout the beautiful summer months for relaxing morning yoga sessions with Boho Warrior Yoga.
item.dc:creator: Yorkshire Wildlife Trust

item.title: ‘Some Steel’: Sculpture and Steel in Britain, 1960-90
item.dc:creator: Visit Leeds

item.title: An Evening of Love, Sex and Scandal at Temple Newsam
item.dc:creator: Visit Leeds

item.title: Birding for Beginner’s- RSPB St Aidan’s
item.dc:creator: Visit Leeds

item.title: In The Picture: Objects in Focus
item.dc:creator: Visit Leeds

item.title: Scarborough 400 - Maritime Heritage Centre
item.description: A special exhibition explaining the past 400 years of Scarborough Spa and the town.
item.location: Scarborough Maritime Heritage Centre, Scarborough Maritime Heritage Centre, 45 Eastborough, Scarborough, North Yorkshire, YO11 1PB
item.ify:location: Scarborough Maritime Heritage Centre, Scarborough Maritime Heritage Centre, 45 Eastborough, Scarborough, North Yorkshire, YO11 1PB
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Botanically Beautiful: Art and design inspired by nature
item.dc:creator: Visit Leeds

item.title: Address
item.description: See the Tower of Now, Saad Qureshi’s 15-metre sculpture at Hall Ings, Bradford, celebrating the city’s diversity and cultural heritage.
item.location: Hall Ings, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 5SD
item.ify:location: Hall Ings, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 5SD
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Waves of Waste beach clean at Scarborough North (Multiple Dates)
item.description: Join our Waves of Waste co-ordinators as they give Scarborough North beach a thorough tidy up to protect marine wildlife.
item.dc:creator: Yorkshire Wildlife Trust

item.title: Address
item.description: Step into the imaginative world of Jim Moir, the celebrated British artist, AKA Vic Reeves at Cartwright Hall, Bradford.
item.location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.ify:location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: At Cartwright Hall, artworks by twelve South Asian artists highlight shared environmental, social and historical realities.
item.location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.ify:location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: At Cartwright Hall, this exhibition pairs contemporary artist film from the Art Jameel collection with a complementary display of Islamic calligraphy from Bradford District Museums & Galleries.
item.location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.ify:location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Several of the largest paintings in Bradford’s collection are brought together in The Big Picture at Cartwright Hall, a display spanning more than two centuries of art.
item.location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.ify:location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Cartwright Hall Art Gallery presents a selection of works from Bradford District Museums & Galleries’ Pre‑Raphaelite collection.

item.title: Address
item.description: Following its success in 2025, Extraordinary Portraits with Bill Bailey returns to The Loading Bay in Bradford. All six original artworks from the hit BBC One series will be on display at this free exhibition.
item.location: Loading Bay, 1 Duke Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 3QR
item.ify:location: Loading Bay, 1 Duke Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 3QR
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: At Bradford Industrial Museum, Made by Many Hands highlights local craft traditions inspired by the Heritage Crafts list and is accompanied by workshops and events across the site.
item.location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Eccleshill, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP

item.title: Address
item.description: At Cartwright Hall, this exhibition revisits the 1904 Great Exhibition by centring the Somali Village and its colonial context.

item.title: Address
item.description: Celebrating 70 years of Eurovision at the National Science and Media Museum. Go behind the sequins of the world’s largest live music event and discover how the magic really happens.

item.description: Sector Safari is an exciting careers trail around the city centre giving you the chance to explore career sectors and jobs locally.

item.title: The Football Art Prize
item.description: The Football Art Prize makes a welcome return to Sheffield to celebrate the passion, drama and unity the beautiful game inspires around the globe.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Cecil Beaton: Staging Icons,
item.description: Organised by the National Portrait Gallery in partnership with Harewood House Trust, Step into the glamorous world of Cecil Beaton, the legendary…
item.location: Harewood House, Harewood House Estate, Harewood, Leeds, LS17 9LF, United Kingdom
item.ify:location: Harewood House, Harewood House Estate, Harewood, Leeds, LS17 9LF, United Kingdom
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Apophenia by Leah Clements
item.description: Apophenia is a new co-commission and the first major solo exhibition in the UK by London-based artist Leah Clements, produced by Arts Catalyst, Sheffield and Peer Gallery, London.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: The Bobeam Tree
item.description: Discover a magical world of interactive discovery for 0–5-year-olds and their grown-ups. The Bobeam Tree is a magical tree, which, as the story goes, grows when surrounded by children’s curiosity, play, thoughts and feelings.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Address
item.description: A new exhibition at the Bradford Police Museum
item.location: Bradford Police Museum, City Hall, Centenary Square, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1HY
item.ify:location: Bradford Police Museum, City Hall, Centenary Square, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1HY
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Peasholm Park Naval Warfare - Battle of Peasholm
item.description: Set on the Peashom Park lake in beautiful garden surroundings. War breaks out on the lake in the middle of the park when the 20-foot replica boats…
item.location: Peasholm Park, Peasholm Park, North Bay, Scarborough, YO12 7TR
item.ify:location: Peasholm Park, Peasholm Park, North Bay, Scarborough, YO12 7TR
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: The Watchers of York: Sculpture Trail
item.dc:creator: Visit York

item.title: Woldies Summer Days & Wild Superhero Mission
item.description: Explore North Yorkshire where adventure meets relaxation. From coast to countryside, uncover history, beauty and charm in England’s largest county.
item.location: Woldies, Sandy Lane, Wintringham, Malton, North Yorkshire, YO17 8HW
item.ify:location: Woldies, Sandy Lane, Wintringham, Malton, North Yorkshire, YO17 8HW
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Sheffield Cablevision
item.description: Free Exhibition about the local Sheffield TV Station (1973-76). Kids shows, sports shows, politics, music, comedy and more. Rare archive footage, photos, objects inside.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Scarborough 400 giant deckchair trail
item.description: Take a seat back in time and discover the history of Britain’s original seaside resort as we celebrate 400 years since the discovery of Scarborough’s spa…
item.location: Scarborough, North Yorkshire
item.ify:location: Scarborough, North Yorkshire
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: The Scarborough Fair - Scarborough Art
item.description: Scarborough Art is an exciting event which takes place at various venues across Scarborough town centre and beyond, running as a sister festival with…
item.location: Various locations, Scarborough, North Yorkshire.
item.ify:location: Various locations, Scarborough, North Yorkshire.
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Cupola’s 35th Anniversary
item.description: Cupola will be celebrating 35 years this year with a group show showcasing the fantastic artists that have supported them through the years and a whole host of new talent.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Settle Flowerpot Festival
item.description: Stroll around Settle during the summer months and be amazed, amused, astounded & astonished by the quirky flowerpot displays decorating the town.
item.location: Settle, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
item.ify:location: Settle, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: 501 Not Out
item.description: Exploring Brian Lara’s remarkable ascent in 1994, the film celebrates his development in Trinidad and features interviews with iconic names from the world of cricket.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Busy Bee Trail
item.description: Buzzzz, do you hear that? The bees are out collecting nectar to make honey. Follow the trail around Staveley and become a bee for the day.
item.dc:creator: Yorkshire Wildlife Trust

item.title: Summer Holidays @ The Craft Cabin
item.description: Get creative this summer holidays at the Craft Cabin at Wentworth Woodhouse! From seasonal crafts to hands-on activities for all ages, this is the perfect way to spend a relaxed summer afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Tropical Treasures Trail
item.description: Follow the flutter, swing and squawk along the Tropical Treasures trail!
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Together We Play: All Summer at The National Videogame Museum
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.description: Unleash your inner pop star over the summer holidays with creative activities for all ages at the National Science and Media Museum.

item.title: Summer Holidays - Ampleforth Adventures
item.description: join us this summer to reconnect with nature and enjoy the simple things in life - fresh air and room to play.

item.ify:location: Ampleforth Abbey, Ampleforth Abbey, York, YO62 4EN, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom

item.title: A Summer in Oz
item.description: There’s no place like Mother Shipton’s this summer.

item.ify:location: Mother Shipton's Cave, Mother Shipton's Cave, , Knaresborough, HG5 8DD, North Yorkshire, North Yorkshire, United Kingdom
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Curtains Up! Outdoor Play - What’s on at Harewood this Summer
item.description: Lights, camera, action! This summer, Harewood takes centre stage with a season dedicated to performance. Whether indoors or outdoors, there’s plenty of…
item.location: Harewood House, Harewood House, Harewood, North Yorkshire, LS17 9LG
item.ify:location: Harewood House, Harewood House, Harewood, North Yorkshire, LS17 9LG

item.title: Wildlife Photography for Beginners at Staveley Nature Reserve
item.description: Join our resident photographer for a wildlife photography for beginners workshop.
item.dc:creator: Yorkshire Wildlife Trust

item.title: Address
item.description: This summer, The Broadway is bringing all the excitement of the fairground indoors with six weeks of FREE family fun!
item.location: Broadway Bradford, Hall Ings, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1JR
item.ify:location: Broadway Bradford, Hall Ings, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1JR
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: The boys are coming back to the Alhambra Theatre.

item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Summer Holiday Activities at Sheffield Manor Lodge – Week 1
item.description: Come along to Sheffield Manor Lodge during the first week of the summer holidays and enjoy fun garden-themed craft and trail activities!
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Matthew Bourne's The Car Man
item.description: Fasten your seat belts. Matthew Bourne’s award-winning The Car Man is back! Loosely based on Bizet’s ever-popular opera, The Car Man has one of the most thrilling and instantly recognisable scores in New Adventures’ repertoire.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Victorian Baking
item.description: Roll up your sleeves and get stuck in to some Victorian baking! Learn a new recipe and take your bakes home to enjoy.
item.location: Ripon Workhouse & Garden Museum, 75 Allhallowgate, Ripon, North Yorkshire, HG4 1LE
item.ify:location: Ripon Workhouse & Garden Museum, 75 Allhallowgate, Ripon, North Yorkshire, HG4 1LE
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Free Summer Crafting
item.description: Free Summer Crafting Join us for our free drop-in Summer Crafting Sessions on The Courtyard EVERY TUESDAY AND THURSDAY! From 11-2, our wonderful team of volunteers will be on hand to help you create some exciting summer crafts. Sessions will run every Tuesday and Thursday throughout the summer holidays except for Thurs
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE
item.ify:location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE
item.dc:creator: The Piece Hall

item.title: Teddy Swims
item.description: GRAMMY nominated vocal powerhouse Teddy Swims will be joining us for an unmissable show at TK Maxx presents Scarborough Open Air Theatre on Wednesday 22nd…
item.location: Scarborough Open Air Theatre, Burniston Road, Scarborough, North Yorkshire, YO12 6PF
item.ify:location: Scarborough Open Air Theatre, Burniston Road, Scarborough, North Yorkshire, YO12 6PF

item.title: Weekly craft workshops
item.description: Get creative in our Wednesday Craft Workshops at Ripon Workhouse Museum

item.title: Hidden City Centre Explore
item.description: A walking tour of Sheffield city centre history.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Woodwork Taster Session
item.description: Interested in learning some woodworking skills in Sheffield? In July, Ed’s Workshop is running beginner-friendly evening woodwork taster sessions. Small classes (maximum 6 people), plenty of hands-on guidance in a welcoming workshop environment.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Amnesty Letter Writing Session
item.description: Join Amnesty Sheffield’s monthly letter-writing session, standing up for human rights one letter at a time. It's free to join and no Amnesty membership required!
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Australian Singer/Songwriter Les Thomas at Mandala Cafe, Sheffield with Marilla Holmes.
item.description: Australian singer-songwriter Les Thomas brings his acclaimed story-led folk songs to the UK this July for a run of intimate headline shows across England.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: I Saw the TV Glow
item.description: Teenager Owen is just trying to make it through life in the suburbs when his classmate introduces him to a mysterious late-night TV show — a vision of a supernatural world beneath their own.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Park Hill Tours - Walk the Streets in the Sky
item.description: Explore a brutalist icon and its bold reinvention
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Superbugs!
item.description: Something strange is happening in the woods! Join Professor Bug’s Superbug training to go on bug hunts, build giant webs, create superbug disguises, and help bring the buzz back to the woodland.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Clamlines - The Fringe At Tramlines @ Delicious Clam
item.description: Clamlines is back for The Fringe at Tramlines for another year, with real pearl of a line-up.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Shakelines - The Fringe At Tramlines @ The Shakespeare
item.description: The Shakespeare are back for their annual Shakelines event! Another massive year of free live music supporting local artists.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: Teen Chef! Summer Holiday Cooking Club!
item.description: Summer Cooking Club for Teens is here at Blend Culinary Foundation!
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: ADHD, Mindfulness and Burnout: Speaker and Networking
item.description: Featuring speaker Camilla, we'll explore challenges, strengths and how you can prevent burnout an manage ADHD symptoms through mindfulness with opportunities to network.
item.dc:creator: Welcome to Sheffield

item.title: The Flaming Lips & The Beta Band
item.description: The Flaming Lips & The Beta Band American psychedelic rockers The Flaming Lips and Scottish indie rock group The Beta Band are to headline a special night in Halifax next summer The double headlining show will see the bands take to the TK Maxx presents Live at The Piece Hall stage on Thursday 23 July.... \n
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE
item.ify:location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE
item.dc:creator: The Piece Hall

item.title: Romeo & Juliet - Ripon Racecourse
item.description: Two hearts. One fate. A timeless love reborn.The Dukes Theatre Company… Two hearts. One fate. A timeless love reborn.The Dukes Theatre Company presents Shakespeares Romeo and Juliet, a bold reimagining of the iconic…
item.location: Ripon Racecourse, Ripon Racecourse, Boroughbridge Road, HG4 1UG

item.title: Tom Jones
item.description: Tom Jones + STONE FOUNDATION Music icon Tom Jones has announced his return to Halifax this summer for a huge outdoor headline show as part of his 2026 Come Gather Round tour. The legendary Welsh singer will take to the stage at TK Maxx Presents Live at The Piece Hall on Saturday 25 July. He... \n
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE

item.title: Tom Grennan
item.description: Tom Grennan + FINN ASKEW & FIONA-LEE Multi-platinum-selling artist Tom Grennan will bring his electrifying live show to Halifax next summer, joined by special guests Finn Askew and Fiona-Lee. The chart-topping BRIT and Ivor Novello-nominated star will head to TK Maxx presents Live at The Piece Hall on Sunday 26 July. I
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE
item.ify:location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE
item.dc:creator: The Piece Hall

item.title: Gary Numan
item.description: Gary Numan + LADYTRON Electronic music pioneer, celebrated songwriter and globally renowned musician Gary Numan will headline TK Maxx presents Live at The Piece Hall on Friday 31 July, joined by special guests Ladytron. Tickets on sale now via ticketmaster.co.uk TICKETS General Admission – Access to general courtyard a

item.title: Address
item.description: Fans can expect a powerful sweep of classic and cosmic Hawkwind music at Bradford Live.
item.location: Bradford Live, 1 Thornton Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 2EP

item.description: Back by popular demand for 2026, Audacious presents a new British South Asian family pantomime! Get ready for an evening of laughter, romance, and larger-than-life entertainment at St. George's Hall.

item.title: Address
item.description: If you’re into vintage cars, come and see amazing old‑timer models, try car‑making with recycled materials, and have a go at the Jowett board game at Bradford Industrial Museum.

item.description: Heritage Tours are back for summer 2026 Over its almost 250-year history, The Piece Hall has been home to the weird, the wonderful & the fantastical.
